description: An official benefit verification letter issued by the Social Security Administration detailing an individual's monthly benefit type and payment amounts.

beneficiary_name.instruction: The full name of the individual receiving the Social Security benefits.

ssn_last_four.instruction: The last four digits of the beneficiary's Social Security Number, if visible on the document.

monthly_benefit_amount.instruction: The current gross monthly dollar amount paid to the individual before any deductions (like Medicare premiums).

benefit_type.instruction: The specific type of benefit being received, such as Retirement, Disability (SSDI), or Supplemental Security Income (SSI).

effective_date.instruction: The date the current payment amount went into effect, typically found near the top or within the payment breakdown text.
